user.title: Ratio EV Charging
user.description: Sign in with the email and password you use in the Ratio mobile app.

data_description.email: The email address you use to sign in to the Ratio mobile app.
data_description.password: The password for your Ratio account.
The updated password for your Ratio account.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Ratio EV Charging
reconfigure.description: Update the credentials for your Ratio account.

data_description.email: The email address you use to sign in to the Ratio mobile app.
data_description.password: The password for your Ratio account.

bluetooth_confirm.title: Ratio Charger Bluetooth
bluetooth_confirm.description: Enable Bluetooth for Ratio charger {serial}? This allows per-phase voltage and current sensors and local Wi-Fi recovery. You must have already paired the charger with this device via Bluetooth settings.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Ratio cloud.

abort.already_configured: This Ratio account is already configured.
abort.account_mismatch: The email address does not match the original account. To use a different account, remove and re-add the integration.
abort.not_supported: This device is not a Ratio EV charger.
abort.cloud_account_required: No Ratio cloud account is configured for this charger. Set up the Ratio integration first.
abort.ble_already_configured: Bluetooth is already enabled for charger {serial}.
abort.ble_configured: Bluetooth enabled for charger {serial}. The integration will reload.

init.title: Bluetooth Settings
init.description: Adjust Bluetooth settings for each Ratio charger.

charger.title: Ratio Charger {serial}
charger.description: Uncheck Enable Bluetooth to disable BLE for this charger. Poll period controls how often BLE sensor values refresh; default 3 s matches the Ratio app.

data_description.poll_period_s: Lower values give faster sensor refresh on capable proxy setups; higher values reduce radio activity.

abort.no_ble_chargers: No Bluetooth-enabled chargers configured. Enable Bluetooth via the discovery notification when your charger is in range.

ble_not_bonded.title: Ratio charger {serial} not bonded
ble_not_bonded.description: Home Assistant cannot connect to the Ratio charger via Bluetooth. Please pair the charger ({serial}) with this device using your operating system's Bluetooth settings, then re-enable Bluetooth in the integration options.

not_ratio_charger.message: Device {device_id} is not a Ratio charger.

no_active_config_entry.message: No active Ratio config entry for device {device_id}.

no_config_entry_loaded.message: No Ratio config entry is loaded.

multiple_accounts.message: Multiple Ratio accounts are configured; this service does not yet support targeting a specific account.

single_device_required.message: {service} accepts only one device per call; {count} were provided.

backfill_overlap.message: Cannot backfill session history: begin_time {begin_time} predates the latest history-import baseline ({baseline}) across affected charger(s) {serials}. Per-charger baselines may differ; choose a begin_time after this latest baseline to satisfy all listed chargers and avoid non-monotonic energy statistics.

ble_not_enabled.message: Bluetooth is not enabled for charger {serial}.

ssid_not_found.message: SSID {ssid} was not found in the Wi-Fi scan results.

ble_connect_failed.message: Could not connect to charger {serial} via Bluetooth: {error}

start_charge.name: Start charge
start_charge.description: Start a charge session on the targeted Ratio charger.

stop_charge.name: Stop charge
stop_charge.description: Stop the active charge session on the targeted Ratio charger.

set_schedule.name: Set schedule
set_schedule.description: Replace the weekly charge schedule for the targeted Ratio charger.

add_vehicle.name: Add vehicle
add_vehicle.description: Register a new vehicle on the Ratio account.

remove_vehicle.name: Remove vehicle
remove_vehicle.description: Remove a vehicle from the Ratio account.

import_session_history.name: Import session history
import_session_history.description: Backfill external statistics from completed charge sessions in the chosen window. begin_time must not predate the history-import baseline of any charger; otherwise the call is rejected to preserve monotonic energy statistics.

begin_time.name: Begin time
begin_time.description: Start of the window to import.

end_time.name: End time
end_time.description: Optional end of the window. Defaults to now.

reconfigure_wifi.name: Reconfigure Wi-Fi
reconfigure_wifi.description: Reconnect the Ratio charger to a different Wi-Fi network via Bluetooth.

ssid.name: SSID
ssid.description: The Wi-Fi network name (SSID) to connect to.

password.name: Password
password.description: The Wi-Fi password (leave empty for open networks).
